allow: PowerShell(try { $health = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "✅ Backend Health: $\($health.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "⚠️ Backend not responding yet \(still starting up\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host "=== Backend Health ===" ; try { $health = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "✅ Backend Health: $\($health.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $health.Content } catch { Write-Host "⚠️ Backend: $_" }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Frontend Access ===" ; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "✅ Frontend: $\($resp.StatusCode\) - React app loaded" } catch { Write-Host "⚠️ Frontend: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "=== Backend Health Check ===" ; try { $health = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "✅ Backend Health: $\($health.StatusCode\) - API Healthy"; $data = $health.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Status: $\($data.status\)" } catch { Write-Host "⚠️ Still initializing..." })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "=== Testing Backend with QNAP PostgreSQL ===" ; try { $health = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "✅ Backend Health: $\($health.StatusCode\)"; $data = $health.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Status: $\($data.status\)"; Write-Host "Database: QNAP PostgreSQL connected ✅" } catch { Write-Host "⚠️ Backend health check: $_" }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Frontend Access ===" ; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "✅ Frontend: $\($resp.StatusCode\) - React app loaded" } catch { Write-Host "⚠️ Frontend: $_" })
